quote: Price-wise, these guys came in $3,000 less than Colonial. The owner himself came out to make sure the templating was done properly.
author: Peter J.

quote: Templated on a Tuesday, installed the following Friday. The seams on our Calacatta island are invisible.
author: Danielle R.

quote: We priced four fabricators. Wholesale was the only one who showed up on time with actual slabs to look at.
author: Mark T.

quote: They redid our kitchen and both baths. One crew, one schedule — no finger-pointing between trades.
author: The Okonkwos

quote: Honest about which stones would hold up with kids. Steered us away from the marble we thought we wanted.
author: Aisha M.

quote: Backsplash tile matched the veining perfectly. You can tell the same people did the counters and the tile.
author: Greg S.

quote: Lifetime warranty is real — they came back two years later to reseal a seam, no charge.
author: Linda & Paul
